audit_items.proof_trace: The only allocation in bio.c is `zmalloc(sizeof(*job))` at L132; it is freed via `zfree(job)` at L205 strictly after all fields (arg1/arg2/arg3) have been dispatched to processing functions at L196-201. After the free, `job` is never dereferenced — only the pre-obtained `ln` (a separate listNode pointer) is used at L210 for `listDelNode`. Single-consumer-per-type design ensures no double-free is possible.
